title: Sales Representative – Hospitality Da Nang, Vietnam
description:
Job Description

Live and Work in Hoi An, Vietnam

Dream Sales Jobs is recruiting for a client in the international travel and holiday sector. This is a full-time, on-site sales opportunity based in Hoi An, located just outside Da Nang on Vietnam’s central coast.

This position is suited for professionals seeking a destination-based sales career in Southeast Asia. If you thrive in face-to-face sales environments and are motivated by performance-based earnings, this role offers both lifestyle and income potential.

This is not a remote or call centre position. All sales are conducted in person in a structured, hospitality-led environment.

About the Role

As a Holiday Consultant / Sales Representative in Hoi An, you will:

  • Conduct in-person sales consultations with international clients
  • Identify customer travel goals and recommend tailored holiday packages
  • Deliver structured product presentations in a professional setting
  • Manage opportunities from introduction through close
  • Achieve defined monthly revenue and conversion targets
  • Maintain a high standard of customer experience throughout the sales process

Performance is measured by:

  • Conversion rate
  • Revenue generated
  • Customer satisfaction
  • Consistency against monthly targets

Required Skills & Experience

  • Strong face-to-face communication skills
  • Confidence presenting to individuals and small groups
  • Ability to assess client needs and recommend solutions
  • Resilience in a commission-based environment
  • Comfort working in a performance-driven sales setting

Preferred Background

  • Experience in in-person sales roles
  • Hospitality, tourism, travel, or customer-facing backgrounds
  • Demonstrated experience meeting revenue or sales KPIs
  • Experience working with Australian or international customers is advantageous

Compensation & Structure

  • 100% commission-based compensation model
  • Realistic monthly earnings
  • Uncapped earning potential
  • Relocation and start-up support package available
  • Full-time on-site contract

Earnings depend on performance and conversion results.

Why Consider This Role in Hoi An?

  • Build a sales career while living in Vietnam
  • Work near Da Nang’s international airport and beaches
  • Clear compensation structure tied to measurable outcomes
  • Transition hospitality or travel experience into structured sales
  • Join a client-facing, revenue-focused team

Hoi An offers a lower cost of living compared to many global cities, while maintaining access to international infrastructure through Da Nang.

Recruitment Process

Dream Sales Jobs is advertising this opportunity on behalf of a client in the travel sector. Shortlisted applicants will be contacted directly and guided through a structured interview process.

Equal Opportunity Statement

Dream Sales Jobs and its client are equal opportunity employers. All qualified applicants will be considered without regard to race, color, religion, sex, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, national origin, disability, or any legally protected characteristic.

How to Apply

Email your CV to:
careers@dreamsalesjobs.com
